# `api.lookup.get_parcel_package_types`

> `GET /lookup/parcelPackageTypes` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_parcel_package_types() -> list[ParcelPackageType]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_parcel_package_types
```

GET /lookup/parcelPackageTypes

## Response

Returns a list of `List[ParcelPackageType]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[int]` | no | Package type ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Package type name |
| `code` | `Optional[str]` | no | Package type code |
| `description` | `Optional[str]` | no | Description |
| `carrierAPI` | `Optional[int]` | no | Carrier API identifier |
| `carrierCode` | `Optional[str]` | no | Carrier code |
| `weightLimit` | `Optional[float]` | no | Weight limit |
| `lengthLimit` | `Optional[float]` | no | Length limit |
| `widthLimit` | `Optional[float]` | no | Width limit |
| `heightLimit` | `Optional[float]` | no | Height limit |
| `priority` | `Optional[int]` | no | Priority |
| `weight` | `Optional[float]` | no | Default weight |
| `length` | `Optional[float]` | no | Default length |
| `width` | `Optional[float]` | no | Default width |
| `height` | `Optional[float]` | no | Default height |
| `isActive` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether active |
| `cost` | `Optional[float]` | no | Cost |
| `sell` | `Optional[float]` | no | Sell price |
